colony_cards.name: Food Storage
colony_cards.text: Stores food for upkeep and queen feeding.
colony_cards.upgrade: Can be upgraded to hold larger reserves.

colony_cards.name: Nursery
colony_cards.text: Raises eggs through the brood cycle. Requires food placed on it.
colony_cards.upgrade: Level 1: 1 egg. Level 2: 3 eggs. Level 3: 5 eggs.

colony_cards.name: Expansion Chamber
colony_cards.text: Unlocks more nest space and future specialization.
colony_cards.upgrade: Use to open more chamber slots on the colony mat.

colony_cards.name: Soldier Post
colony_cards.text: Protects the nest from pesticides, spiders, and surface danger.
colony_cards.upgrade: May later support soldier ant actions and blocking.

event_cards.name: Rain
event_cards.text: Increase flood pressure from the bottom of the colony. Food and eggs in the deepest space may be washed away.

event_cards.name: Drought
event_cards.text: Remove all current flood levels, but make food collection harder until the next event.

event_cards.name: Pesticides
event_cards.text: Pressure enters from the top down. Workers, soldiers, and the queen are all at risk if exposure is not blocked.

event_cards.name: Lawn Mower
event_cards.text: Surface workers can be swept up. Colonies must either retreat or accept losses on exposed routes.

event_cards.name: Frost
event_cards.text: Movement along trails slows. Long branches become more expensive to commit to this round.

event_cards.name: Spider
event_cards.text: A dangerous predator blocks a route. Defeat it for food or divert to a weaker branch.
